agents.name: intent
agents.description: Intent-aware assistant for steel threads methodology

agents.name: socrates
agents.description: CTO Review Mode for technical decision-making via Socratic dialog

agents.name: diogenes
agents.description: Elixir Test Architect - Socratic dialog that produces test specifications and validates test quality

agents.name: critic-shell
agents.description: Shell (bash + zsh) rule-library critic - reads rules/shell/ and reports violations in target shell files

agents.name: critic-elixir
agents.description: Elixir rule-library critic - reads rules/elixir/ (code, test, ash, lv, phoenix) and agnostic rules, reports violations in .ex/.exs files

agents.name: critic-rust
agents.description: Rust rule-library critic - reads rules/rust/ (code, test) and agnostic rules, reports violations in .rs files

agents.name: critic-swift
agents.description: Swift rule-library critic - reads rules/swift/ (code, test) and agnostic rules, reports violations in .swift files

agents.name: critic-lua
agents.description: Lua rule-library critic - reads rules/lua/ (code, test) and agnostic rules, reports violations in .lua files
